title: SecureDatagramChannel EDHOC context not closed on shutdown
description:
File: python/src/lichen/coap/secure.py:568-570

close() only closes the inner channel:
```python
def close(self) -> None:
    self._inner.close()
```

But _edhoc_ctx (aiocoap.Context for EDHOC exchange) created at line 511 is never shut down. This leaks:
1. aiocoap internal state
2. The _EdhocChannel wrapper
3. Any in-progress EDHOC futures in _pending_edhoc

Fix: Properly shutdown all resources:
```python
def close(self) -> None:
    for future in self._pending_edhoc.values():
        future.cancel()
    self._pending_edhoc.clear()
    if self._edhoc_ctx is not None:
        # Schedule async shutdown
        asyncio.create_task(self._edhoc_ctx.shutdown())
    self._inner.close()
```
close_reason: Implemented proper cleanup of _pending_edhoc futures and _edhoc_ctx in close() and _begin_teardown(); added cancel and scheduled shutdown to prevent leaks. Verified with git commit f8362ad7e
